message:
test(fcp-host): expand enforcement, health, and output_capture tests

enforcement.rs: 160 → 215 (+55 tests) — config builder chaining,
check ordering priority, boundary conditions for all 9 pipeline checks,
pipeline composition edge cases, context clone fidelity.

health.rs: 158 → 193 (+35 tests) — merge commutativity, Display
formatting, ResourceHealth exact threshold boundaries, HealthAggregator
escalation paths, ConnectorHealth crash loop threshold.

output_capture.rs: 139 → 202 (+63 tests) — RingBuffer clone/overflow,
OutputCapture JSON parsing edge cases, InstallStatus/Options/Result
serde, BufferStats, unicode content, partial line handling.

fcp-host total: 3125 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
